title: sorghum humile
intro: Sorghum humile, also known as broom sorghum, is a species of grass in the sorghum genus, characterized by its slender stems and feathery panicles. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Consuming Sorghum humile has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Sorghum humile is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being incorporated into supplements and other traditional remedies.
